title: Create alert with all required fields filled → saved successfully
stepsToReproduce:
1. Click '+ Create New Alert'
2. Fill in Name, Brokerage, Description
3. Set Expiration: No Expiration
4. Toggle Notify Via: Web + Email
5. Set Active ON
6. Add If Condition block
7. Click Create Alert
expected: Alert is saved and appears in the Alert List with status Active. All configured fields are persisted correctly.
actual: Alert submit produced no success signal. Validation messages: (none)

title: Keyword search returns matching strategies
stepsToReproduce:
1. Open Algo Hub
2. Click Search box
3. Type 'EMA' and press Enter
4. Review results
expected: Only strategies with 'EMA' in their name are shown. Result count updates accordingly.

title: Create Grid bot with valid default values
stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to Bot Trading → Futures Grid
2. Enter all fields with the above values
3. Click Create Bot
expected: Bot created successfully. Grid orders placed at equal price intervals between 50,000 and 80,000. Bot visible in active bots with status Running.
actual: Submitted but no success signal within 30s. Validation messages: (none)

title: lowerPrice equal to upperPrice — validation error
stepsToReproduce:
1. Enter lowerPrice = 70000 and upperPrice = 70000
2. Click Create Bot
expected: Validation error displayed: 'Lower price must be less than upper price.' Bot not created. Start Bot button is disabled.
actual: Expected validation error or disabled submit, but neither surfaced. Likely an app bug: invalid config was accepted silently.

title: lowerPrice greater than upperPrice — validation error
stepsToReproduce:
1. Enter lowerPrice = 80000 and upperPrice = 50000
2. Click Create Bot
expected: Validation error: 'Lower price must be less than upper price.' Bot not created. Field highlighted. Start Bot button is disabled.
actual: Expected validation error or disabled submit, but neither surfaced. Likely an app bug: invalid config was accepted silently.

title: maxNearestLevels validated — must be a positive integer less than 10
stepsToReproduce:
1. Enter maxNearestLevels = 0 → attempt save
2. Enter maxNearestLevels = 10 → attempt save
3. Enter maxNearestLevels = 1.5 → attempt save
expected: Test A: Error 'Must be > 0'. Test B: Error 'Must be less than 10'. Test C: Error 'Must be a whole number'. None of the three configurations create a bot.
actual: Expected validation error or disabled submit, but neither surfaced. Likely an app bug: invalid config was accepted silently.

title: Create DCA bot with valid configuration — all fields
stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to Bot Trading → DCA
2. Fill all fields with above values
3. Click Create Bot
expected: Bot created. Base order placed immediately at market. System schedules up to 5 safety orders at 1% price deviation intervals below entry.
actual: Submitted but no success signal within 30s. Validation messages: (none)

title: maxDcaOrders = 0 — valid, bot runs with base order only
stepsToReproduce:
1. Enter maxDcaOrders = 0
2. Create bot
3. After base order fills, observe if any DCA orders are placed
expected: Bot created successfully. Base order placed. No DCA/safety orders are ever placed regardless of how much price falls. Bot waits for TP or SL on the base position only.
actual: Submitted but no success signal within 30s. Validation messages: (none)

title: takeProfit field left empty — system transmits 0, bot runs without take profit
stepsToReproduce:
1. Leave takeProfit field blank
2. Create bot
3. Monitor bot — confirm no TP order is placed after entry
4. Inspect bot config in Details view
expected: Bot created without error. Details view shows takeProfit = 0 or 'None'. No take profit order is placed on the brokerage. Position stays open until manually closed or SL triggers.
actual: Submitted but no success signal within 30s. Validation messages: (none)

title: stopLoss = 0 — valid, bot runs without stop loss
stepsToReproduce:
1. Enter stopLoss = 0
2. Create bot
3. Simulate large price drop past DCA levels
4. Check if any stop loss order fires
expected: Bot created without error. No stop loss order placed. Position remains open after large price drop. User is exposed to full downside — this is expected and per spec.
actual: Submitted but no success signal within 30s. Validation messages: (none)

title: Create TWAP bot with valid configuration
stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to Bot Trading → TWAP
2. Enter all fields with above values
3. Click Create Bot
expected: Bot created. System calculates number of slices = (60 × 60) ÷ 30 = 120. Each slice quantity ≈ 0.1 ÷ 120 ≈ 0.000833 BTC. First limit order placed at market open.
actual: Submitted but no success signal within 30s. Validation messages: (none)

title: Create Portfolio Rebalancing with valid config — RegularIntervals mode
stepsToReproduce:
1. Navigate to Bot Trading → Portfolio Rebalancing
2. Add BTCUSDT (50%) and ETHUSDT (50%)
3. Set mode to RegularIntervals, frequency EveryDay, time 08:00:00
4. Click Create Bot
expected: Bot created. System schedules daily rebalance at 08:00. At trigger time, bot calculates current allocation vs target and places buy/sell orders to reach 50/50 split.
actual: Submitted but no success signal within 30s. Validation messages: (none)

title: No asset target added — validation error (at least 1 required)
stepsToReproduce:
1. Leave portfolio targets empty
2. Click Create Bot
expected: Validation error: 'Please add at least one portfolio target asset.' Bot not created.
actual: Expected validation error or disabled submit, but neither surfaced. Likely an app bug: invalid config was accepted silently.

title: Search for non-existent trading pair
stepsToReproduce:
1. Open pair list
2. Type 'XYZABC' in search box
3. Wait for results
expected: No results shown. Empty state message displayed such as 'No pairs found'.
actual: Expected empty state for nonsense pair search; no empty-state text visible.
